title: Author apple-pi organism with engine binding + sessionSchemaRefs
description: apple-pi is pi's identity executing on Apple FoundationModels via swift-apple-pi-cli's session model register — pi-semantics on a different inference engine. The harness needs its own v1.0.0 organism that articulates the engine binding: composition singular, profileType harness, aspects.harness only (no agent aspect, host-only like hulk/codex), runtimeKinds ["cli"], identity.inherits referencing pi, identity.extensions.engineBinding=FoundationModels with sessionSchemaRefs=[{family:pi-session-schemas, version:0.1.0}], implementation refs at swift-apple-pi-cli (ApplePiAgentTool, ApplePiSessionCompactionTool, ApplePiBeatCompactionTool, AppleIntelligenceAgentModel). Also fix the stale routing pointer in apple-pi's existing AGENTS.md/IDENTITY.md ("../../collectives/pi/" → "../pi/" since pi is now a harness, not a collective).
resolutionNote: Landed: apple-pi organism authored at harnesses/apple-pi/private/universal/identity/apple-pi@rismay.substrate.organism.json. Shape: composition singular, profileType harness, aspects.harness only (host-only — apple-pi carries no agent persona). aspects.harness.doc declares schemaVersion 0.2.0, runtimeKinds [cli], sessionSchemaRefs [pi-session-schemas v0.1.0]. The engine-binding distinction (apple-pi vs pi) is captured in identity.extensions.engineBinding: engine=FoundationModels, sessionModelRegister=ApplePiAgentTool, agentModel=AppleIntelligenceAgentModel, tools=[ApplePiAgentTool/SessionCompactionTool/BeatCompactionTool/AppleIntelligenceAgentModel]. identity.inherits points at pi's organism for semantic identity. Updated apple-pi's AGENTS.md + IDENTITY.md to (a) replace the stale '../../collectives/pi/' pointer with '../pi/' since pi is now a harness sibling, (b) reverse the earlier 'no durable organism here' rule per the 2026-05-14 doctrine update. LDT proof pair authored: positive asserts engineBinding fields + inherits-pi reference; negative synthesizes 'pi-shape-without-engine-binding' and asserts 4 distinguishing predicates fail exactly as expected (proving the engineBinding gate is not vacuous). Both run green via swift <file>.
